# SHADY SCANNER: WU-TANG AI CLAN SECURITY ARCHIVE

## Description
ShadyScanner.com is a technical diagnostic tool and security resource managed by the Wu-Tang AI Clan. Its mission is to identify "shady" website configurations and provide actionable hardening strategies.

## Host Information
- Environment: CT 121 (app-server) / CT 120 (webserver)
- Prototyped by: Slim Shady
- Authority: thevoiceofcash.com

## Core Knowledge Base
- Website Security Indicators (SSL, Headers, DNS, Ports)
- The Shady Scanner Report (Technical Blog)
- Stay Safe Tips (Rapid-fire Security Protocols)

## Strategic Funnel
All diagnostic data and security advice funnels to professional human consultations at:
https://thevoiceofcash.com/consultation
